summary: Classified the five open inventory PRs independently using the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical is selected for this inventory shard. No GitHub mutations are planned because instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and PR-raising are disabled, and the open PRs either need proof, maintainer review, or maintainer consolidation rather than automated closeout.

actions.reason: Legitimate focused performance work, but proof/check failures and stale/conflicting state require human or author follow-up before any merge or close decision.
Related focused gateway/message-delivery work, but draft status, failing proof checks, and technical correctness questions block automated closeout or finalization.
Useful focused implementation remains related and should stay open for maintainer review; automated merge/close is unavailable and review-preflight proof is incomplete.
Maintainer-owned focused draft with active maintainer signal; keep open independently for maintainer review.
Related to other open provider diagnostics hardening drafts; maintainers need to choose or consolidate the canonical branch before any close or merge path.

needs_human: #62822: decide whether to request fresh real Discord status-probe proof/rebase from the author or close manually outside this no-instant-close inventory job.
#63007: decide whether the remaining gateway suppressed-send behavior still warrants a new narrow fix path or author follow-up, since this draft fails proof and targets stale delivery wiring.

#63347: maintainer review is needed to decide whether the prepared head resolves prior Codex review findings and whether the failed Real behavior proof is acceptable for this optional config capability.
#89067: maintainer-owned draft requires maintainer review before any finalization.
